hero.title: Favorite food,
hero.subtitle: Discover thousands of delicious dishes from top restaurants. Order with just a few taps and receive it at your doorstep!

info.quickestDesc: - Fast Bite provides the fastest food delivery in the market.
info.easiestDesc: - Order with just a few taps. Order online or download our app for a faster experience.
info.varietyDesc: - From local fare to restaurant favourites, we satisfy all your cravings.
info.paymentDesc: - Easy payment with FastPay and many other methods.
info.rewardsDesc: - Earn points for every order and redeem for amazing rewards.
info.whatIsDesc: Fast Bite is the fastest Food Delivery service in Vietnam. We have curated all your favorite dishes, restaurants, and cuisines to help you grab your food in the easiest & quickest way possible. Find and order your favorite cuisines across Vietnam - order food online in just a few taps!
info.howToOrder: How to order food in Vietnam?
info.howToOrderDesc: Here is the easiest way to order food via Fast Bite in Vietnam:
info.step1: 1. Search for your favorite restaurant or dish - Enter your address on the homepage. Browse Restaurants and dining spots near you. Select your favorite restaurant, browse the menu and choose the dishes you want to order.
info.step2: 2. Checkout & Payment - Once you're sure you've ordered everything you need, click on the “ORDER NOW” tab and enter your final delivery address. Choose the payment method that suits you best and pay.
info.step3: 3. Delivery - Fast Bite has designed a seamless customer journey for you to enjoy your food to the fullest. We will send you an instant email and SMS confirming your order and estimated delivery time. We will then deliver your food immediately.
info.247Service: Does Fast Bite provide 24x7 food delivery?
info.247ServiceDesc: We only know one thing, it's "food", so of course we provide this service. Please note, although we are a 24x7 food delivery partner, some restaurants in our directory may restrict late night delivery or may not be available for orders. However, we have listed restaurants that serve your late night cravings in the Late Night Delivery section.
info.cashPaymentDesc: Of course! Fast Bite accepts all forms of payment for food delivery services, including cash on delivery in Vietnam.
info.onlinePayment: Can I pay online on Fast Bite for my order?
info.onlinePaymentDesc: Fast Bite accepts many forms of payment for online food orders, including online payment in Vietnam by credit card, debit card, PayPal or cash on delivery.
info.orderForOthers: Can I order food on Fast Bite for someone else?
info.orderForOthersDesc: Of course, take care of your loved ones by sending their favorite food to their doorstep. You just need to update the delivery address and recipient's name before placing your order.
info.deliveryFee: How does Fast Bite calculate delivery fees?
info.deliveryFeeDesc: Our delivery fee depends on many operational factors such as the distance from your location to the restaurant. You can check the exact delivery fee payable before checkout in the checkout section on the app. There is also a “Free Delivery” section listing restaurants near you that do not charge a delivery fee.
info.restaurants: Which restaurants are listed in Fast Bite?
info.restaurantsDesc: What do we have on Fast Bite? We are proud to have the widest range of restaurants and dishes of any food delivery app in Vietnam. You can choose from thousands of restaurants on Fast Bite Vietnam. You can order food online from all your favorite spots of Burger King, Jollibee, KFC, McDonalds, Long John Silver, Pastamania, Dominos Pizza, Pizza Hut, Subway! Fast Bite also has limited promo codes, deals and discounts exclusive to restaurants in the directory.
info.minOrder: Does Fast Bite have a minimum order value?
info.minOrderDesc: Yes! But you can pay the difference if your order value is less than the minimum order amount.

appPromo.curatedDesc: From small bites to big meals, we won't limit your appetite. Go ahead and order all you want.
appPromo.appTitle: More cool features available on the app
appPromo.appDesc: Download Fast Bite app to use other payment methods and enjoy seamless communication with your driver.

footer.description: Vietnam's leading online food ordering platform. Thousands of restaurants, diverse dishes, fast delivery.
